title: Steel Companies' Profits Hurt by Falling Prices
text: Cleveland-Cliffs, United States Steel, Nucor and Steel Dynamics reported significantly lower profits from their steelmaking operations during the quarter that wrapped up at the end of September, compared with the same period last year when prices were at record levels.

title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For November 2022
text: NOBL fell 9.15% in September, which brings the Funds return for the year to a loss of 17.47%. Thus far this month, through October 24th, the dividend aristocrat ETF is up 6.04%, bringing its year-to-date return to -12.49%.

title: Nucor Corporation (NUE) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript

title: Nucor's (NUE) Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates in Q3
text: Nucor (NUE) tops earnings and sales estimates in Q3 despite lower profitability in its steel mills unit.

title: Steel Dynamics, Nucor Earnings Due As This Steel Stock Shows Strength

title: Nucor (NUE) Gears Up for Q3 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: Lower selling prices are likely to have weighed on Nucor's (NUE) steel mills segment in Q3.

title: 3 Steel Producer Stocks to Escape Industry Challenges
text: Lower steel prices, soft automotive demand and the China slowdown dampen prospects for the Zacks Steel Producers industry. NUE, STLD and TX are well poised to navigate through the current challenging environment.

title: Bear Markets Come and Go, and These 3 Dividend Aristocrats Just Keep Paying
text: These companies have kept raising their dividends in any market condition. In fact, two are already Dividend Kings and the third is about to be.

title: CMC Stock Falls, Prepares To Launch Steel Reporting Season
text: CMC stock fell Wednesday with earnings due early Thursday. Fellow steelmakers have given mixed signals as steel prices slide.

title: Nucor Is A Long-Term Winner With Great Management
text: Shares of Nucor have performed very well, and despite economic headwinds, I see further upside. Management has done an excellent job taking advantage of the strong profits of the past 18 months to buy back stock, grow, and diversify the business.

title: Why Nucor Shares Are Jumping This Week
text: New growth investments aren't the only reason the stock jumped this week.

title: Nucor's (NUE) Board Clears Construction of Galvanizing Lines
text: Nucor's (NUE) investments are in sync with the company's strategy of shifting its mix to higher margin value-added products.

title: 7 Stocks to Sell Amid a Commodity Crash
text: Headline inflation numbers continue to run near their highest levels in 40 years. The Federal Reserve hiked interest rates by 75 more basis points in September.

title: 10 Stocks Completely Avoid The Looming October 'Jinx'

title: The 7 Best Long-Term Stocks to Buy Now
text: It's imperative to understand that not all of the best long-term stocks are typically high risk, high reward. They require investors to believe in their long-term potential to gain traction and cement their positioning in their respective sectors.
